name: HMS Lion | The Reclining Dandelion
description:
"What's this? Have you been charmed by the lazy lion? Well, when the mood is comfortable and relaxed, the lion shows its soft side."

Description: Living up to her name, Lion is a fierce and regal high-ranking Royal Navy battlecruiser. Always confident, dominant, elegant, and looking out for the port, Lion is extremely fearless as befitting that of a leader.

Series: Azur Lane
creator: Chunter
